summary: Release evidence index exists and includes MVP capabilities, verified scope, forbidden claims, and the production-like external signoff boundary.

commands.command: test -s .agent-board/release-evidence/G004-S024-release-evidence-index.md && rg -n --max-count 20 'Current MVP Capabilities|Verified Scope|Cannot Claim Yet|production_like_ready_external_signoff_required' .agent-board/release-evidence/G004-S024-release-evidence-index.md
